description: ≈ 2 million people per day attend Rio street celebrations during Carnaval.
Caruaru + Campina Grande festivals together attract around 24 million visitors annually (they claim to host the biggest São João festival in the world).
Copacabana hosts around 3 million people on New Year's Eve.
Brazil produces/sells over 12 million Easter eggs annually (industrial + artisanal combined easily goes beyond that).
